title: pip3 image build fails on Ubuntu 22.04 WSL - ends with "directory not empty" error
body:
I'm trying to build a simple pip3 app on ubuntu 22.04/WSL but it fails with a "directory not empty" error

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. Install buildah and podman on Ubuntu 22.04 running on WSL (windows 10)
2. Download repository from https://github.com/peekjef72/veeam_exporter
3. Try to build as privileged user with "sudo buildah build -f Dockerfile --log-level debug"

**Describe the results you received:**
Build fails with the following message:
```
INFO[0000] [graphdriver] using prior storage driver: overlay
STEP 1/8: FROM python:3.10-slim-buster
STEP 2/8: WORKDIR /app
STEP 3/8: COPY pip_requirements.txt requirements.txt
STEP 4/8: COPY . .
STEP 5/8: RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
WARN[0000] pkg/bind: error removing "/var/tmp/buildah218132968/mnt": directory not empty
ERRO[0000] directory not empty
error running container: error bind mounting root filesystem from "/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/77cc52c21a23e580463f7b6d8098e9511cbc3f7fe7c06ff2eabcef41783a98bf/merged" to "/var/tmp/buildah218132968/mnt/rootfs": invalid argument
error building at STEP "RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt": error while running runtime: exit status 1
```
Additional debug info:
 ```
DEBU[0003] /etc/system-fips does not exist on host, not mounting FIPS mode subscription
DEBU[0000] "/var/tmp/buildah2410167409/mnt" is apparently not really mounted, skipping
WARN[0000] pkg/bind: error removing "/var/tmp/buildah2410167409/mnt": directory not empty
ERRO[0000] directory not empty
error running container: error bind mounting root filesystem from "/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/d2b88270d7adab4e0dd057c41e5a1783895a9a431dbe3780bc45304c1e41faf4/merged" to "/var/tmp/buildah2410167409/mnt/rootfs": invalid argument
DEBU[0003] error building at step {Env:[PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin LANG=C.UTF-8 GPG_KEY=HIDDEN PYTHON_VERSION=3.10.10 PYTHON_PIP_VERSION=22.3.1 PYTHON_SETUPTOOLS_VERSION=65.5.1 PYTHON_GET_PIP_URL=https://github.com/pypa/get-pip/raw/d5cb0afaf23b8520f1bbcfed521017b4a95f5c01/public/get-pip.py PYTHON_GET_PIP_SHA256=394be00f13fa1b9aaa47e911bdb59a09c3b2986472130f30aa0bfaf7f3980637] Command:run Args:[pip3 install -r requirements.txt] Flags:[] Attrs:map[] Message:RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt Original:RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt}: error while running runtime: exit status 1
error building at STEP "RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt": error while running runtime: exit status 1
DEBU[0003] shutting down the store
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Successful build of my container image.

**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

```
oliviert@RPS000106:~/poc/veeam_exporter$ apt list buildah
Listing... Done
buildah/jammy,now 1.23.1+ds1-2 amd64 [installed]
```

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
oliviert@RPS000106:~/poc/veeam_exporter$ buildah version
Version:         1.23.1
Go Version:      go1.17
Image Spec:      1.0.1
Runtime Spec:    1.0.2-dev
CNI Spec:        0.4.0
libcni Version:
image Version:   5.16.0
Git Commit:
Built:           Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
BuildPlatform:   linux/amd64
```

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
oliviert@RPS000106:~/poc/veeam_exporter$ cat /etc/*release
DISTRIB_ID=Ubuntu
DISTRIB_RELEASE=22.04
DISTRIB_CODENAME=jammy
DISTRIB_DESCRIPTION="Ubuntu 22.04.2 LTS"
PRETTY_NAME="Ubuntu 22.04.2 LTS"
NAME="Ubuntu"
VERSION_ID="22.04"
VERSION="22.04.2 LTS (Jammy Jellyfish)"
VERSION_CODENAME=jammy
ID=ubuntu
ID_LIKE=debian
HOME_URL="https://www.ubuntu.com/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://help.ubuntu.com/"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/"
PRIVACY_POLICY_URL="https://www.ubuntu.com/legal/terms-and-policies/privacy-policy"
UBUNTU_CODENAME=jammy
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
Linux RPS000106 4.4.0-19041-Microsoft #2311-Microsoft Tue Nov 08 17:09:00 PST 2022 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

```
cat: /etc/containers/storage.conf: No such file or directory
```

**Output of `buildah info`:**
```
root@RPS000106:~# buildah info
{
    "host": {
        "CgroupVersion": "v1",
        "Distribution": {
            "distribution": "ubuntu",
            "version": "22.04"
        },
        "MemFree": 8763129856,
        "MemTotal": 16942206976,
        "OCIRuntime": "runc",
        "SwapFree": 31583657984,
        "SwapTotal": 31605125120,
        "arch": "amd64",
        "cpus": 8,
        "hostname": "RPS000106",
        "kernel": "4.4.0-19041-Microsoft",
        "os": "linux",
        "rootless": false,
        "uptime": "2h 47m 28s (Approximately 0.08 days)"
    },
    "store": {
        "ContainerStore": {
            "number": 0
        },
        "GraphDriverName": "overlay",
        "GraphOptions": null,
        "GraphRoot": "/var/lib/containers/storage",
        "GraphStatus": {
            "Backing Filesystem": "<unknown>",
            "Native Overlay Diff": "true",
            "Supports d_type": "true",
            "Using metacopy": "false"
        },
        "ImageStore": {
            "number": 1
        },
        "RunRoot": "/run/containers/storage"
    }
}
```

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
